test_cases.name: create_author_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be created with all fields (name, bio, born_year)

test_cases.name: create_author_with_minimal_fields
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be created with only required fields (name)

test_cases.name: create_author_with_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author with a duplicate name returns a conflict error

test_cases.name: create_author_with_empty_name
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author with an empty name returns a validation error

test_cases.name: get_existing_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that an existing author can be retrieved

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a nonexistent author returns a 404 error

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_match
test_cases.description: Verifies that a 304 Not Modified is returned when the ETag matches

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be updated with valid data

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verifies that a 412 Precondition Failed is returned when the ETag does not match

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author without associated books can be deleted

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an author with associated books returns a conflict error

test_cases.name: create_book_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be created with all fields

test_cases.name: create_book_with_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with a duplicate ISBN returns a conflict error

test_cases.name: create_book_with_invalid_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with a nonexistent author returns a 404 error

test_cases.name: list_books_with_pagination
test_cases.description: Verifies that books can be listed with pagination

test_cases.name: list_books_with_filters
test_cases.description: Verifies that books can be filtered by author_id, category_id, and price range

test_cases.name: get_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that an existing book can be retrieved

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a soft-deleted book returns a 410 Gone error

test_cases.name: update_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be updated with valid data

test_cases.name: update_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating a soft-deleted book returns a 410 Gone error

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a soft-deleted book can be restored

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that restoring a non-deleted book returns a 400 error

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_eligible_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a discount can be applied to a book published more than 1 year ago

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that applying a discount to a new book returns a 400 error

test_cases.name: apply_discount_exceeding_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Verifies that applying a discount exceeding the rate limit returns a 429 error

test_cases.name: update_stock_with_valid_quantity
test_cases.description: Verifies that the stock of a book can be updated with a valid quantity

test_cases.name: update_stock_with_insufficient_quantity
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating stock to a negative value returns a 400 error

test_cases.name: upload_valid_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verifies that a valid cover image can be uploaded

test_cases.name: upload_unsupported_file_type
test_cases.description: Verifies that uploading an unsupported file type returns a 415 error

test_cases.name: upload_oversized_file
test_cases.description: Verifies that uploading a file exceeding the size limit returns a 413 error
